activities.title: Library Tuesday
activities.notes: Storytime or browse — return any holds

activities.title: Kelsey Creek Farm — Oma Wednesday
activities.notes: Free, no reservation needed. Animals 9am-3pm. Bring snacks + hand sanitizer, stroller ok. Wear closed-toe shoes — ground can be muddy. No feeding animals.

activities.title: Kaffeehaus de Châtillon — Café Thursday
activities.notes: Viennese coffee house — only Traditional Viennese Kaffee, no substitutions. Try the Melange + Sachertorte. Open 8am-3pm Thu. No outside food or drink allowed (including water bottles or toddler snacks — feed Heiki before you go or order from the menu). Located at 16108 Ash Way, Lynnwood.

activities.title: Mukilteo Lighthouse Park — Adventure Friday
activities.notes: 0.6 mi flat paved path along the water — fully stroller-friendly. Beach access, playground, and front-row ferry watching (Mukilteo-Clinton route). Historic 1906 lighthouse on grounds. Ivar's Fish Bar next door for lunch. ~15 min from Lynnwood. Park open 6am-10pm.
